title: RealMLP diversity expert without target encoding
summary: Add a small-weight RealMLP expert that disables target encoding while keeping the parent intact.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Keep the existing parent prediction unchanged. Add a RealMLP expert trained on the same folds and features except target-encoded columns are omitted or TE is disabled. Blend with a small fixed weight.
expected_effect: Provide a less leakage-prone and less correlated neural prediction stream.
risk: Prior TE blocks are useful, so removing them may produce too weak an expert.
